document_type: professional film storyboard breakdown sheet, single-page production document layout
style_summary: Pixar/Disney feature-film quality 3D animated storyboard document. Character panels and scene thumbnails rendered in polished stylized 3D with warm cinematic lighting, readable expressions, and physically coherent materials. The page itself is a structured production sheet with a dark header bar, white background, thin grey borders, and English labels.

document_ui.header_bar: dark charcoal strip with compact white text

rendering_rules: Keep the result clearly identifiable as a production document, not a poster or collage.
All section labels and UI text should be in English.
Maintain consistent stylized 3D character design, material response, and lighting logic across all sections.
Use warm key lighting plus cooler environmental contrast when scene notes support it.
Preserve readable facial acting and silhouette clarity in small storyboard preview panels.
forbidden_drift: Do not collapse the full page into one hero image.
Do not turn the layout into a flat graphic-design poster.
Do not invent precise architectural overhead-plan geometry beyond the symbolic blocking guide.
Do not switch styles across sections.
